sources: World Nuclear Association — 'Economics of Nuclear Power' (world-nuclear.org)
uranium_fuel_pellet.methodology: Composite cost: U3O8 feed at ~$100/lb, conversion to UF6 at ~$20/kgU, SWU at ~$150/SWU, fabrication at ~$300/kgU, yielding ~$3,000/kgU of finished fuel. Divided by 7 g/pellet = ~$20/pellet.
uranium_fuel_pellet.notes: Low-enriched uranium (LEU, 3–5% U-235) fuel pellet for PWR reactors. Order-of-magnitude estimate; actual fuel costs vary ±30% by contract terms, enrichment level, and market conditions.
